response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web/backend skills, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not map to the C++ cloud-compute platform mandate.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform deployable on Kubernetes, showing ownership
Strong community/mentoring track record via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement; C/C++ exposure limited to ~6 months at NI
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed systems at the required scale
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems experience
